blocks.title: The manufacturer's rep that actually returns your call

blocks.step_2_title: Connect you to the right brands

blocks.title: Everything you need to know
blocks.answer_1: We represent 25+ leading brands in plumbing, heating, HVAC, and specialty products. See our full linecard for details.
blocks.answer_2: MRA covers Rhode Island, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Vermont, New Hampshire, Maine, and parts of New York.
blocks.answer_3: We provide training, technical support, market development, quoting, and direct access to manufacturer partners.
blocks.question_4: How fast can I get quotes and availability?
blocks.answer_4: We aim for same-day response on all quotes and technical questions. Call us and we'll get back to you fast.
blocks.question_5: Do you work with specific product categories?
blocks.answer_5: We serve all segments: plumbing, heating, HVAC, engineered products, and specialty chemicals.
blocks.question_6: How do I connect with the right territory manager?
blocks.answer_6: Contact us and we'll match you with the manager who covers your area.

blocks.testimonial_1_quote: MRA doesn't just take orders. They understand our market and actively help us grow. That's rare.
blocks.testimonial_2_quote: The training they provide has directly helped our sales team become more effective. They're invested in our success.
blocks.testimonial_3_quote: When we need support, MRA is there. Fast response, knowledgeable, professional. That's the standard we expect.

blocks.title: Our promise
blocks.statement: If we don't deliver the service and support we promise, tell us. We'll make it right.
blocks.details: Your success is our success. We stand behind our commitment to responsive service, market expertise, and genuine partnership.

blocks.legal_text: 2026 MRA Limited. Manufacturer's Representative serving New England. Located in Cranston, Rhode Island.

about.title: About MRA Limited | Manufacturer's Representative
about.description: MRA Limited — leading independent manufacturer's representative serving New England wholesalers

blocks.title: Creating and strengthening relationships
blocks.subtitle: MRA is a leading independent manufacturer's representative serving New England wholesalers in plumbing, heating, and HVAC

blocks.paragraph_1: MRA was founded on a simple principle: wholesalers deserve a manufacturer's representative who understands their market and is committed to their success.
blocks.paragraph_2: We're not a call center. We're not a generic middleman. We're local experts who know the New England market, have deep relationships with top manufacturers, and are genuinely invested in helping you grow.
blocks.paragraph_3: Everything we do is built on partnership. Your success is our success. Your growth is our growth. That's how we do business.
blocks.name: Jon Mitchell & Tom Rayko

blocks.feature_1_description: We are proactive ambassadors for every brand we represent
blocks.feature_2_description: We constantly search for new opportunities to grow your business
blocks.feature_3_description: We listen to what our customers want and solve problems creatively
blocks.feature_4_description: We offer training to all levels of the wholesale supply chain
blocks.feature_5_description: Top-notch customer support. Responsive. Professional. Always available.
blocks.feature_6_description: We ensure that our industry partners are profitable

blocks.section_title: Five professionals committed to your success
blocks.member_1_bio: 20+ years industry experience. Drives strategy, manufacturer relationships, market development.
blocks.member_2_bio: Deep expertise in wholesaler relationships, territory management, business growth.
blocks.member_3_bio: Order management, quoting, account support. First point of contact for wholesalers.
blocks.member_4_bio: Customer support, technical questions, training coordination. Builds relationships.
blocks.member_5_bio: Territory coverage, account development, contractor relationships. Field presence.
